iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    core
  COPTS
    "-fexceptions"
  HDRS
    "core/hrx_loader.hpp"
    "core/hrx_test_fixture.hpp"
  SRCS
    "core/hrx_loader.cpp"
    "core/main.cpp"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    iree::third_party::catch2
    libhrx_defs
  INCLUDES
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/../include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/core>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/core>"
  PUBLIC
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

if(IREE_ROCM_TEST_TARGET_CHIP MATCHES "^gfx")
  iree_amdgpu_binary(
    NAME
      hrx_cts_noop_kernel
    TARGET
      "amdgcn-amd-amdhsa"
    ARCH
      "${IREE_ROCM_TEST_TARGET_CHIP}"
    SRCS
      "tests/executable/noop_kernel.c"
  )

  add_dependencies(libhrx_cts_hrx_cts_executable
    libhrx_cts_hrx_cts_noop_kernel)

  install(FILES
      "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/hrx_cts_noop_kernel.so"
    DESTINATION
      "${HRX_INSTALL_TESTS_DIR}/testdata/libhrx/cts"
    COMPONENT
      "${HRX_INSTALL_TESTS_COMPONENT}"
  )
endif()
